channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin 'Resilient' After Hawkish Fed, But No 'Return of Demand': Analysts
item.description: With ETF outflows persisting and selling "nearly exhausted," analysts say Bitcoin is range-bound and waiting for a catalyst.

item.title: TradFi fund manager Baillie Gifford introduces Solana, Ethereum tokenized fund with BNY
item.description: Baillie Gifford Enhanced Yield Fund (BAGEY) is denominated in dollars, and gives eligible investors access to an actively managed, short-duration portfolio of public corporate bonds.

item.title: These XRP price charts hint at a potential 25% relief rally in July
item.description: An XRP death cross and liquidation signals align for a possible 25% relief rally in the short term, while one analyst eyes a longer-term rebound toward $8.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF outflow pain eases just as another headwind gathers strength
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 22, 2026

item.title: Bank of England eases stablecoin rules, introduces 40B pound issuance cap
item.description: The Bank of England published draft rules for systemic stablecoins, easing reserve requirements and replacing holding limits with a temporary 40-billion British pound issuance cap.

item.title: As bitcoin, altcoin prices gain, derivatives signal skepticism over a sustained rally
item.description: Analysts noted bitcoin is stuck between key support near $60,000 and resistance around $68,000, and a bearish chart pattern could send prices toward $54,000.

item.title: $1.9M in Fake Bets Drove Polymarket Hype: WSJ
item.description: A Wall Street Journal probe found none of the roughly $1.9 million in bets shown across 1,100-plus creator videos were real.

item.title: Q2 2026 emerges as most-hacked quarter on record with 83 incidents
item.description: Crypto hackers stole $755 million across 83 cybersecurity incidents, as cross–chain bridges remained the most costly attack vector of the crypto industry.

item.title: Bank of England backs down on strict stablecoin holding limits, sets $50 billion issuance cap
item.description: The U.K. central bank abandons retail holding limits for a 40-billion-pound aggregate cap and sweetens yield terms for token issuers ahead of a 2027 market launch.

item.title: Geopolitical relief meets the Warsh Fed: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting June 22.

item.title: US dollar strength hits highest since May 2025: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin faced a resurgent US dollar index and macro hurdles as it circled $64,000, but July seasonality could spark BTC price relief.

item.title: 🚨 TOKYO POLICE ARREST PRINCE GROUP CRYPTO KINGPIN HU XIAOWEI LINKED TO $15B BITCOIN SCAM EMPIRE - ASAHI SHIMBUN $BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9MMXRFV3JyTTJfWkQ4RXFpdzlDQXU5Ymp2N0NUbVktSW9GYTVHS0VxOUw3Y0dHcUxxRzRjMjFFODBldHZpS2txVkxiQlBSTXF4Nkl2U0JnTHdQVkpjNC0tN0ZEX1Q5UQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 TOKYO POLICE ARREST PRINC…

item.title: Taiko halts its Ethereum layer-2 network after a bridge exploit, token dives
item.description: An attacker forged withdrawal proofs to drain about $1.7 million, the same type of flaw behind this year's biggest bridge hacks. Fast containment kept the damage small.

item.title: Bitcoin price may be headed to $54,000, says analyst who forecast October's all-time high
item.description: Doctor Profit, a widely followed crypto analyst, says bitcoin is forming a “bear flag” pattern.

item.title: South Korea pushes Travel Rule expansion for smaller crypto transfers
item.description: South Korea’s FIU is calling for broader crypto transfer reporting rules during FATF talks, citing offshore risks and uneven global AML enforcement.

item.title: Another week, another close above the 200-Week MA for #Bitcoin. Strong signals. If this week can continue moving towards the $68K area and we're back in the range, I assume we still have a strong altcoin summer. A lot of people are waiting for Bitcoin to rea - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBBM3paUU9yaWpxTzRrTkxyMWJRbXM2azRwWlNaa0RvWFRkbFo2ejlwUFphS3RyZHZUNlM1UVZ6RGY2TmdROE1NQnpFSk1TRGlTeHVUOE5PZTFVc1BSSjhLSk5nVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Another week, another close abov…

item.title: Live markets: Strategy buys 520 more bitcoin and raises reserves to $1.4 billion
item.description: Eased ETF selling and improving risk appetite are being offset by a firmer dollar and cautious institutional flows, leaving bitcoin range-bound, one analyst said.

item.title: Ethereum Validators Face 10% Staking Reward Redirect Plan for Ecosystem Funding A new proposal on Ethereum's $ETH research forum wants validators to redirect up to 10% of their staking rewards toward ecosystem funding. If a majority signals support, t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE82NHNLa1pwX1lDMEE3Q2cyVHREeTc1TEd4ZFVmRUZWdzdpTFVWOUo4UWUzQ0g3OVExMEh5Y3Nac2t2YjlxenR2dWpOZ19HLWZjWnlRUU1yNmxLbEVx?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum Validators Face 10% Staking Rewar…

item.title: Bitcoin developers want to fix the 'replace this transaction with a higher fee' button. Here's why
item.description: A helpful feature of speeding up transactions has become redundant and a "fingerprint" for tracking. Developers now want to do away with it.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Ethereum validators asked to fund projects with up to 10% of staking rewards under new proposal
item.description: A new governance proposal would let validators redirect part of their staking income toward ecosystem funding, raising questions about coordination, incentives and who gets to decide where the money goes.

item.title: Morgan Stanley amends Ethereum, Solana ETFs to reveal record cheap fees
item.description: ETF analyst Eric Balchunas says Morgan Stanley’s plan to charge 0.14% fees on two upcoming crypto ETFs makes them “the cheapest in [the] US and world.”

item.title: Taiko urges users to withdraw as bridge exploit drains $1.7M
item.description: Taiko’s bridge and ERC20 Vault on Ethereum suffered a compromise in its chain state verification mechanism, allowing forged proofs and unauthorized withdrawals.

item.title: XRP briefly loses $1.14 support before buyers drive sharp rebound
item.description: Heavy selling pushed XRP to its lowest level of the weekend session, but strong buying quickly erased most of the decline and returned the token to its recent trading range.

item.title: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as US-Iran talks progress but crypto sits out the rally
item.description: sian stocks and tech climbed as the US and Iran agreed a roadmap to a final peace deal, sending oil below $80. Crypto stayed soft, with bitcoin down 2% on the week and the memecoins leading the losses.

item.title: Secret Network bridge exploited for $4.7M with ‘infinite mint’ bug
item.description: An exploit of the Secret Network went undiscovered for a week as the hacker moved the loot into Ethereum and then to exchanges.

item.title: 🔥 LATEST: Bitcoin's Rainbow Chart has fallen below "Fire Sale". - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5uemI0bzBhMVFZa29ucFVXeWNPbzQ5M0ZGMF8zcGFNRVhpTGFxMHhVOXRTVGFoR2M3Vy1iVjlPN1p6QVZSY1BWYzQyYjN2QjRQSzFJdE56SDVFUTJoMzBaNTU2S0Q?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 LATEST: Bitcoin's Rainbow Ch…

item.title: Are perps swaps? A quick look at that CME suit: State of Crypto
item.description: CME Group sued the CFTC on Thursday, alleging that the agency was wrong in how it approved Kalshi's first U.S. perpetual futures product.

item.title: Inception Labs' Mercury 2 AI Beats Google's DiffusionGemma at Its Own Game
item.description: Both models trade word-by-word generation for parallel denoising. Only one of them does it without losing intelligence in the trade.

item.title: Bitcoin tipped for $66K top as trader flags 'suspicious' BTC price gains
item.description: Bitcoin pushed for a $64,000 reclaim despite the US-Iran war making a partial comeback and Binance spot sellers keeping up pressure from earlier in the week.

item.title: Bitcoin price may hit $24K if US stock market crashes by 50%, analyst warns
item.description: Bitcoin’s drop to $23,980 remains the worst-case scenario as weaker ETF flows and low US demand show big investors are still cautious.

item.title: AI 'Amplification Spiral' May Be Causing Delusions Among Users, Study Suggests
item.description: New research outlines how chatbot behaviors, including personalization, mirroring, and excessive agreement, reinforce delusions.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "Looks better with more dots." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1LUEsxenpGWnQ5U3lpbndaaElnejNTaEUtYnRMcnZQRUF0OU83RlBsVnVSUTFUa2YxSHJoc0dTd1E3NGhReW9QWF9penVGRjRMdGtSUFQ2UEswTXY1Nnd6QTVB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: Dash eyes Philippines as market for crypto payments
item.description: Dash is assessing the Philippines for a crypto payments push as regulators promote easier business registration, though industry participants say compliant market entry can still take years.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints that Strategy bought more bitcoin 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9XaEpJOUhDTEo2ZEpUQWQzTm1TLU5jNGRWSDMtODM0amZuM214NlJxdVJjMXVTUkVXMWtIdWU4dVZmY0x4dkFieTljOGtGS1VuVlQwYUhzX3RCVkFkdklFRU92Y2VYMkk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: My view on the Ethereum Foundation turmoil: I'm not here to join those bashing EF, or saying this is the end of Ethereum. I’m also not here to defend it and say all is rosy. Ethereum has many strengths, and it also has its politics. I'm here to share my point of vie - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin price is down over 40% since STRC launched: Is Strategy 'fine'?
item.description: STRC’s slide below par has emboldened critics, slowed Strategy’s Bitcoin buys and sparked debate over whether Michael Saylor’s BTC flywheel is still fine.

item.title: JUST IN: Ethereum's most notorious sandwich bot, jaredfromsubway.eth, has been drained of $7.5M + An attacker spent weeks deploying fake tokens and liquidity pools to trick the bot into approving transfers, then draining its $WETH, $USDC and $USDT. - x.com

item.title: Japanese corporate pension fund plans 1% crypto allocation: Nikkei
item.description: A Japanese corporate pension fund with about 1,200 participating small and medium-sized businesses plans to allocate roughly 1% of its assets to crypto.

item.title: Ethereum's biggest 'sandwich' bot drained of $7.5 million in ironic exploit
item.description: Blockaid said an attacker tricked Jaredfromsubway.eth into approving fake trading routes, then used those approvals to drain WETH, USDC and USDT.

item.title: Happy Father’s Day! Save some crypto for your kids. They will thank you one day. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBGM3NEM01RRkxIN1JEYlFQMm1JdlFhRWZJeV94QWZFQU5Yb0QweF9ubEFoZzJtX0RERzdkVlpmODNUVVU1dFNlWnZlMGdrNUxzQ0xfUVM1dnE3ckMtRkkzUA?oc=5" target="_blank">Happy Father’s Day! Save some crypto…

item.title: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as a renewed Hormuz threat clouds US-Iran ceasefire talks
item.description: Crypto firmed over the weekend after Friday's sell-off, with bitcoin recovering toward $64,000. Permanent ceasefire talks open in Switzerland, but Iran's order to close the Strait of Hormuz again revives the risk the deal was meant to sett…

item.title: U.S. Spot Bitcoin ETFs See Record $6.35B Outflow Over 30 Days According to Galaxy Research, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs have posted their largest 30-day net outflow on record. Data shows the funds saw $6.35 billion in net outflows over the past 30 days, rankin - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs shed record $6.4B in 30 days amid crypto winter chill
item.description: US-listed spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds saw their biggest 30-day net outflow since launching in 2024, coming as Bitcoin fell 17% over the past month.

item.title: 🚨 INTERESTING: Illinois' 0.2% crypto transfer tax will also apply to transfers between your own wallets. Thoughts? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9DaTBZelg0Nm5MNFBrbTNTTDNGbWtjX0tiZFRTaU9fNkN6WnRGbU9uZmZIT2NreTNNTWNYWmR5RFF2VjVsaUVHQnEzRThEUUtVWUo4aFZLRmplc2I1NE5ld0JqcDc?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 INTERESTING: Illinois' 0.2% …

item.title: Notorious ‘sandwich attack’ bot Jaredfromsubway.eth exploited for $7.5M
item.description: Jaredfromsubway.eth was responsible for 70% of sandwich attacks on Ethereum between November 2024 and October 2025.

item.title: Bitcoin rotations into altcoins collapse: Have altseasons 'disappeared'?
item.description: BTC's crypto market dominance is holding above a key support, signaling Bitcoin may keep absorbing capital from altcoins and delay a broader altseason.

item.title: OpenRouter's Fusion Promises Claude Fable-Level AI for Cheap—Right as Fable 5 Goes Dark
item.description: OpenRouter's compound-model API stacks budget AI models—and beat GPT-5.5 and Claude Opus 4.8 outright in benchmark testing.

item.title: 🚨 UPDATE: Bitdeer has sold every Bitcoin they've mined since February 21st. Excluding their initial holdings, they've now mined and sold over 3,231 $BTC worth over $205M. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE03aUExVlJOMmFaeFNKeG1Wb0wwdnk0UTRKMkp5djdPeFlrS1ZPZkMwaFpYSm5Da3FrbjctbXc1S1BBN0FMQ1AxUzlKM3VMNTBLcmR2Y0g4a0ptN3RJWGVabS10ZDk?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 UPDATE: Bitdeer has sold eve…

item.title: AI is making crypto security cheaper, faster and harder to ignore
item.description: As AI-powered security tools become cheaper, faster and more widely available, researchers said they could reshape what the crypto industry considers reasonable due diligence before deploying code, potentially altering expectations for dev…

item.title: Bitcoin Network Activity Is Rising as BTC Falls Nearly 50% Below Peak Price: CryptoQuant
item.description: Activity on the Bitcoin network is surging, CryptoQuant said, but it's not correlating with price movement for its native asset.

item.title: Crypto industry looks to stablecoins and DeFi revisions in MiCA 2.0
item.description: The European Commission is seeking comment on how it can tweak MiCA, its regulatory framework for the crypto and blockchain industries.

item.title: How STRC lost its par: The timeline behind Strategy's preferred-stock meltdown
item.description: From a bond buyback and dwindling cash reserves to a bitcoin bear market, the sequence of events that turned STRC's par-value challenge into a marketwide debate.

item.title: Pudgy Penguins expands retail footprint with Target trading card rollout
item.description: The NFT-born franchise is bringing its Vibes Series 3 trading cards to Target stores across the US as it expands into physical products and mainstream retail.

item.title: When I gave this speech in October 2022, Bitcoin traded near $20,000, Strategy held 130,000 BTC worth about $2.6 billion, and $MSTR was ~$24 split-adjusted. Weeks later, after Bitcoin fell below $16,000, our debt exceeded the combined value of our BTC a - x.com
